notes: Critical fix: horizon-sensitive one-off income bug. A YEARLY recurring one-off (e.g. Hemant Annual bonus ₹1,80,000 dated 2027-09) whose start month fell AFTER the projection horizon end was incorrectly back-filled into an earlier month — leaking ₹1,66,667 into Sept 2026 when the projection horizon was short (budgetEnd before 2027-09). This made surplus, cash, and net worth depend on the horizon length, so the Projection sheet (variable budgetEnd) and Net Worth page (fixed 121-month horizon) disagreed for the same month. Root cause: in expandOneOff's yearly branch, when the original month was not found in the window, the 'else' path assumed the original was BEFORE the horizon and back-filled forward from horizon start — but it could also be AFTER the horizon end. Fix: if the one-off's start month is after the window end, contribute nothing; only back-fill when genuinely before the window, and never place an occurrence earlier than the original month. With this fix the savings chain and net worth are identical on both pages regardless of budgetEnd/valuationDate. Confirms the v51 unified savings projection now holds under all horizon settings.
